# Goran Radmanovic — Senior Web Developer

> Senior Web Developer with 8+ years of experience in building high-quality, user-centric web solutions using Vue, Nuxt, JavaScript, and PHP.

## About Me

I am a highly motivated and results-oriented web developer with 8+ years of experience. I embrace new technologies, learn quickly, and excel in delivering user-friendly and visually appealing websites tailored to client needs. Passionate about modern technologies and delivering exceptional web projects across industries like IoT, E-commerce, Betting, and Fintech. Available for freelance collaboration.

## Skills

- Vue.js
- Nuxt.js
- JavaScript
- PHP
- HTML
- CSS
- Web Development
- Modern Frontend Technologies
- SPA & PWA Concepts
- UI/UX Focused Development
- AI Tools (Cursor, Github Copilot, LLM Studio)

## Experience

Professional experience includes crafting robust web apps and collaborating across diverse industries. Expertise spans frontend development, full stack features, responsive design, performance optimization, and freelance project delivery.

Portfolio section showcases project work, case studies, or examples of completed web solutions. (Displayed on the portfolio website.)
